data.general: Expect a mixed week with Sun's influence bringing opportunities in relationships and partnerships, but Mars' placement in the 4th house may cause some emotional turmoil. Your self-confidence may be affected by the planetary positions. You might feel a bit restless or anxious, but try to stay focused on your goals.
data.luck: Your luck might be changing this week, as Jupiter and Venus in the 6th house are bringing some positive energy to your career and daily routines. However, Rahu's placement in the 2nd house may cause some unexpected expenses or financial setbacks. Try to be cautious and plan ahead.
data.scope: With Mercury in the 6th house, your scope of work may expand this week, and you might receive new opportunities or projects. Your communication skills will be put to the test, so be prepared to present your ideas clearly and confidently. Saturn's influence in the 3rd house may cause some delays or setbacks, but don't get discouraged.
data.study: Your study routine may be affected by the planetary positions, as Mars in the 4th house may cause some distractions or emotional turmoil. Try to stay focused and avoid procrastination. With Jupiter and Venus in the 6th house, you may have opportunities to learn new skills or expand your knowledge in your chosen field.
data.love: In the realm of love, Sun's influence in the 5th house may bring some excitement and passion to your relationships. However, Mars' placement in the 4th house may cause some tension or conflict with your partner. Communicate openly and honestly to resolve any issues that may arise.
data.travel: Travel plans may be put on hold this week, as Saturn's influence in the 3rd house may cause some delays or setbacks. However, with Mercury in the 6th house, you may have opportunities to explore new places or cultures through your work or daily routines.
